response.overview: Midori Wakui, a private tutor, harbored special feelings for her student's mother, Saori. Midori seized every opportunity to seduce Saori when they were alone. Saori, too, was drawn to Midori, but her sense of responsibility as a mother kept her resisting. After a quiet yet intense battle of wits, the two finally crossed the line. Just then, Saori's father, Koudai, returned home after a long business trip, creating tension in the intimate atmosphere between them.
response.title: 家庭教師
